title: alpinia uviformis
intro: Alpinia uviformis, also known as the Green Tumeric, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family, native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alpinia uviformis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and respiratory health. Alpinia uviformis is often prepared as a powder or extract, and can be used in herbal remedies such as teas, capsules, and topical creams.
